name: io.github.mguozhen/voc-amazon-reviews-mcp
title: VOC Amazon Reviews
description: Agent-native Amazon review intelligence. Fetches reviews from 10 marketplaces via real Shulex OpenAPI (not scrapers), tagged with verified-purchase, Vine, and helpful-vote signals. Produces copy-ready listing improvements grounded in real customer language, backed by a 2B-review historical dataset.

environmentVariables.name: VOC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Shulex VOC OpenAPI key. Get a free one (100 calls/month, no credit card) at https://apps.voc.ai/openapi

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key. Only needed if you use extract_listing_improvements.
